messages.body: Did you get a chance to reschedule the meeting?
Hey Tanya, How have you been??
Hey Kanak! I’ll probably have to reschedule for Monday if that’s okay. I’ll still be working and won’t be near my laptop. Would Monday or Tuesday of next week work better for you guys?
I hope you are doing well.
Yes, Tanya, any weekday before 1 PM EST would work for us.
Can we pre schedule the meeting today? My GBP and Local SEO team member is not available post 1 PM EST.
Thank you Tanya for being so patience and understanding.
Hey Tanya
We will give 100% to get you verified and start fresh.
Hello Tanya,  Absolutely no worries.
I hope you're doing well.
Hey Kanak! I apologize for the delayed response but we still never got it resolved. Is there anyway that we could try again possibly tomorrow or Friday?
We can try it tomorrow for sure.

Please use my calendar link to schedule a time with me so I can give you my undivided attention and focus entirely on getting your profile verified. A 30-minute slot would be ideal. Let me know if that works for you.
Hello Tanya,  How have you been?
I did call you thrice, unfortunately wasn't able to connect. Could you please let me know a good time for you to connect? A quick phone call would also do.
Okay, sounds great!
How did the call go?
Hey Tanya, I hope you are doing well!  Thank you so much for understanding. Let us meet today and get everything fixed for you.
Was it helpful Tanya?
